qtype: time calculation with time zones, currency conversion
tex:
Hank flies from Los Angeles to Shanghai.
\newline

(a) The flight departs on Friday 22 July at 21 40.
\newline
The flight takes 13 hours 35 minutes.
\newline
The local time in Shanghai is 15 hours ahead of the local time in Los Angeles.
\newline
Find the day, date and time in Shanghai when Hank's flight arrives.
\newline

Day  , Date  , Time 

(b) The cost of the flight is \$920.
\newline
The exchange rate is \$1 = 6.87 Chinese yuan.
\newline
Find the cost of the flight in yuan.
\newline

 yuan

\newline
The flight takes 13 hours 35 minutes.
\newline

\newline

\newline

Day \AnswerLine[][] , Date \AnswerLine[][] , Time \AnswerLine[][]

\newline

stem.content:
Hank flies from Los Angeles to Shanghai.
\newline

_rawBody:
Hank flies from Los Angeles to Shanghai.

\begin{parts}
\item The flight departs on Friday 22 July at 21 40.
The flight takes 13 hours 35 minutes.
The local time in Shanghai is 15 hours ahead of the local time in Los Angeles.
Find the day, date and time in Shanghai when Hank's flight arrives.

Day \AnswerLine[][] , Date \AnswerLine[][] , Time \AnswerLine[][]
\Marks{3}

\item The cost of the flight is \$920.
The exchange rate is \$1 = 6.87 Chinese yuan.
Find the cost of the flight in yuan.

\AnswerLine[][] yuan
\Marks{1}

\end{parts}
